content.method: Use the study or pilot design stated in the migrated v1 research agenda.
content.question: A 5-8 year longitudinal matched-cohort study comparing TEIP-enrolled and non-enrolled students, controlling for baseline SES and prior achievement, tracking assessed competency gain rather than exam pass rates, to test whether TEIP-style funding closes achievement gaps (S4).
content.why_it_matters: It can change the comparison of transformation choices.
